item.roacw.mars_engine.desc: Putting on this armor, you feel a power emanating from it that you've never felt before, something precise yet violent, like an automaton designed for carnage.
item.roacw.auric_tesla_cuirass.desc: After finding all of the components to forge such a masterpiece, this armor makes you feel unstoppable, as if the entire world will bow to you.
item.roacw.fearmonger_platemail.desc: The one thing you have understood through your journey is that, fear is the greatest weapon. Harnessing the elements of the endothermic elements of the cold, and the nightmarish fuel of the heat, fear consumes your enemies, for you are both the blazing heat, and the chilling cold.
item.roacw.statis_curse.desc: Summons will occasionally inflict a stack of Shadowflame, up to 5 stacks.
item.roacw.evasion_scarf.desc: Press V to dash forward, gaining a small speed boost and damage boost afterwards.
item.roacw.nightmare_tome.desc: You swear you could hear screaming coming from the book...
item.roacw.elemental_gauntlet.desc: Melee attacks will inflict Elemental Mix.
item.roacw.murasama_blade.desc: The Only Thing I Know For Real...
effect.roacw.shadowflame.desc: Reduces regeneration by 20% and deals damage over time.
effect.roacw.elemental_mix.desc: Reduces armor, armor toughness, movement speed, spell resistance, and regeneration. Deals damage over time.
effect.roacw.auric_charge.desc: Infuses you with increased armor, armor toughness, spell resistance, movement speed, attack damage and spell power. Also increases regeneration.
effect.roacw.auric_exhaustion.desc: You are unable to revive with the Auric Tesla Armor!
effect.roacw.evasion_scarf_buff.desc: Grants a small damage, spell power and speed buff.
spell.roacw.quick_strike.guide: Slash at your target multiple times, inflicting Disabled and Severed on hit, and heals you for 35% of the damage dealt
spell.roacw.final_rend.guide: Charge up a powerful slash obliterating nearby entities caught within. Inflicts Disabled and Severed on hit, and healing you for all damage dealt.
